 fledge 0.1.99.9054

    • Changelog

    fledge: Smoother Change Tracking and Versioning for R Packages

    Source: R/fledge-package.R
    fledge-package.Rd

    Streamlines the process of updating changelogs (NEWS.md) and versioning R packages developed in git repositories.

    See also

    Useful links:

    • https://fledge.cynkra.com/

    • https://github.com/cynkra/fledge

    • Report bugs at https://github.com/cynkra/fledge/issues
